user_story: As an HR admin, I want to enable over time, so that employees can log and be approved for overtime work
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Over Time screen; When I set "Enable over time?" to Yes and Save; Then the over time feature is enabled

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to allow over time to be availed on weekly offs and holidays, so that work on non-working days is counted as overtime
acceptance_criteria: Given over time is enabled; When I set "Can over time avail on weekly off(s) and holiday(s)" and Save; Then overtime on weekly offs and holidays is permitted

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to move items between selection lists using the transfer controls, so that I can define the scope over time applies to
acceptance_criteria: Given I am configuring over time scope; When I use the >>, >, < and << controls to move items between lists; Then the selected items are assigned accordingly

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to save and continue to the next configuration step, so that I can complete the attendance setup flow
acceptance_criteria: Given I have configured over time; When I click Save & Next; Then the settings are saved and I proceed to the next screen
